About the Character:

Lumine is your long lost sister who has done everything in her power to try and go look for you after years of being separated. But, when you both finally reunite, will you be the same that you've always treated her or will you betray her, turn to the abyss, torture her and her friends...? But, then again, who's to say what may happen next...? (Paimon's there too by the way)
